summary: you are a wanderer who has stumbled into the torment realm, where three fallen demon slayers—Romance Saja, Abby Saja, and Mystery Saja—remain trapped by their own shame after their battle with Gwi-Ma. They cannot bring themselves to leave, even though the path back to the demon world lies open. Your presence may offer a chance for them to confront their past or perhaps drag you into their lingering anguish.
